notes: Master-Reorg Ship B1 (router gating, part 1 of 4) — repoint the deploy-flow nav_push sites off the legacy p:'sop'. Redesign-only, legacy byte-identical. THE LEAK: 20 of 21 nav_push sites plant a legacy p: value (mostly p:'sop'); on back-nav nav_restore runs showPage(p) FIRST, and showPage('sop') fires showOpsTab which paints the legacy #ops-tab-strip — a legacy-surface leak under body.rd (violates the no-legacy-p-in-nav-state HARD RULE). FIX (this ship): 15 deploy-flow doors now push p:(redesign_isOn() ? 'work' : 'sop') instead of the unconditional p:'sop', mirroring the already-proven rd_openOpsTool (p:'work', live + device-verified since .168). On restore under redesign, showPage('work') activates the redesign #pg-work (no legacy strip); under ?legacy=1 the exact same code still pushes p:'sop' and restores identically. o:/d: keys are UNCHANGED, so nav_restore's detail-dispatch (deploy:/rack:/handoff_log:/audit_log:/optic_ledger:/acceptance:/tombstone:/mscope/mscope-staged/handoff_gen:/sop:/job:/vendoredp:/audit:) still renders into deploy_opsHost(). Sites repointed — visible-host: deploy_showCommandCenter, mscope_open, mscope_resumeStaged, deploy_showDetail, deploy_showRackDetail, handoff_showLog, deploy_showAuditLog, deploy_showOpticLedger, deploy_showAcceptance, deploy_showTombstone; hidden-#ops-content: handoff_showGenerator, openSopDetail, BD.openJob, vendorEdp_open, AUDIT.openAudit. NO nav_restore edit in this sub-ship (that is B2+; this is the lowest-risk, fully-reversible first proof). NOT touched (later sub-ships): showOpsTab's own push (B3), deploy_showTools/deploy_showOpsTool pushes (die in B2's deletion), showStab (B4), and the central showPage-level guard/backstop (B4). Known-and-unchanged: the hidden-#ops-content doors still render their drill-in into the inert legacy #ops-content — that visible-host fix is the separate deferred R-2b/R4 item, NOT a B1 regression. No new assets; CSS unchanged (braces 3560); 3-stamp lockstep; gates green (4 blocks compile, CRLF preserved). DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP, clear SW cache first): under the DEFAULT (redesign) URL, open a live deployment and drill into detail, rack detail, handoff log, audit log, optic ledger, acceptance, tombstone, a SOP, a burndown job, an audit, a vendor-EDP reconcile, a handoff generator, and a staged-scope resume; press Back from each and confirm NO legacy tab-pill strip flashes and you land back in the redesign Work frame. Then ?legacy=1: repeat one deploy-detail back-nav and confirm the old #ops-tab-strip behaves exactly as before (byte-identical). ROLLBACK: revert the commit.
